recommendations.title: Night of the Living Deb
recommendations.overview: After a one night stand Deb wakes up in the middle of a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Cockneys vs Zombies
recommendations.overview: A group of Cockneys arm themselves to rescue their elderly relative and his retirement home friends who are trapped and fighting off a zombie attack during a zombie apocalypse in the East End of London.

recommendations.title: MexZombies
recommendations.overview: A group of teenagers must face a zombie apocalypse, and help reestablish order.

recommendations.title: The End?
recommendations.overview: A businessman gets stuck in his office elevator, but this nuisance soon turns into a nightmare, for in the outside world a zombie apocalypse has taken place...

recommendations.title: It Stains the Sands Red
recommendations.overview: In the throes of a zombie apocalypse, a troubled woman from Las Vegas with a dark past, finds herself stranded in the desert with a lone and ravenous zombie on her tail.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: L'Atalante
recommendations.overview: Newly married couple Juliette and ship captain Jean struggle through marriage as they travel on the L'Atalante along with the captain's first mate and a cabin boy.

recommendations.title: High School of the Dead: Drifters of the Dead
recommendations.overview: In their efforts to find a safe haven from the zombie apocalypse, the gang find themselves on a deserted island. Now, they take advantage of the momentary respite to enjoy some surf, sand and bathing suits!

recommendations.title: Freaks of Nature
recommendations.overview: In the town of Dillford, humans, vampires and zombies were all living in peace - until the alien apocalypse arrived. Now three teenagers-one human, one vampire, and one zombie-have to team up to figure out how to get rid of the visitors.

recommendations.title: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: Desperate to save their marriage, a young couple takes a deal to move into their dream home, but disturbing events reveal the house's troubled history.
